content.text:
The track ahead is a long straight with the car perfectly centered on the dashed line, fully on course.

**Waypoint analysis:**
- nearest_waypoints[1] = 1, target index = (1+5) % 121 = 6
- Target WP6: x=3.9583, y=0.6836
- Car: x=3.1997, y=0.6831, heading=0.183°
- dy = 0.6836 - 0.6831 = 0.0005, dx = 3.9583 - 3.1997 = 0.7586
- bearing = atan2(0.0005, 0.7586) = 0.038°
- delta = 0.038 - 0.183 = -0.145° → |delta| < 5°, go straight

**Boundary check:**
- edge_distance = 0.381 - ~0 = ~0.381m → well clear

```json

  "reasoning": "Long straight ahead with car perfectly centered and heading aligned; delta is essentially zero so maintain full speed with no steering correction.",

    "Track starts with a long straight along y≈0.683 before curving right around x=6.3.",
    "Car is perfectly centered at race start.",
    "Use steering_angle=0 on straights to avoid oscillation.",
    "Prefer speed 1.5 on straights and gentle curves.",
    "Big right curve begins around waypoint index 22-30 (x~6.3-7.2).",
    "After the right curve, track goes left and loops back.",
    "Track total length ~17.7m, 121 waypoints.",
    "At step 2, car has not moved — may be starting lag; keep full speed."
  ],

    "x": [3.1997, 3.1997],
    "y": [0.6831, 0.6831],
    "heading": [0.183, 0.183]
  },

  "steering_angle": 0.0
}
```
